home.heroSubtitle: Premium quality food wholesale — delivered with care.
home.welcomeHeading: Quality You Can Taste. Service You Can Trust.
home.welcomeBody: Larry Inver Wholesale has been serving Philadelphia's finest restaurants, caterers, and food service professionals with the freshest ingredients at wholesale prices. We bring the market to your kitchen.
home.ctaBody: Join hundreds of Philadelphia-area businesses who trust LIW for their daily supplies.
home.emailPopupBody: Sign up for our newsletter and be the first to hear about new products, seasonal specials, and promotions.

about.heading: About Larry Inver Wholesale
about.missionBody: To provide Philadelphia's food service community with the highest-quality wholesale ingredients, delivered with the warmth and reliability of a family business.
about.value1Body: Every product is sourced for peak freshness and quality.
about.value2Body: We build long-term partnerships with our clients, not just transactions.
about.value3Body: Consistent, on-time delivery you can count on to run your kitchen.

history.heading: Our Story
history.subheading: Decades of dedication to quality and community.
history.milestone1Body: Larry Inver starts a small produce distribution operation out of South Philadelphia with a single truck and a big vision.
history.milestone2Body: Growing demand leads to our first warehouse and expanded product lines including meats and dairy.
history.milestone3Body: A milestone moment — over 200 Philadelphia-area restaurants now rely on LIW for their daily supplies.
history.milestone4Body: We open our dedicated seafood division, partnering directly with coastal fisheries for the freshest catches.
history.milestone5Body: Investment in refrigerated fleet modernization and first digital ordering systems.
history.milestone6Body: LIW goes fully digital — bringing the same great service to an online ordering experience.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subheading: We're here to help — reach out any time.
contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.hours:

ordering.orderConfirmBody: Thank you! Your order has been received and a confirmation email will be sent to you shortly. Our team will review and confirm your order within 2 business hours.

deals.heading: Weekly Deals & Pricing
deals.subheading: Fresh picks, rotating specials, and wholesale pricing — updated weekly. Call to confirm today's availability.
deals.note: Prices subject to change. Minimum orders may apply. Delivery available throughout Greater Philadelphia.

ai.greeting: Hi! I'm your LIW ordering assistant. Tell me what you need and I'll find the right products for you.
ai.placeholder: e.g. I need 40lbs of chicken breast...
ai.fallback: Our team is available Mon–Fri 6AM–4PM. Call us or browse products above.
ai.minimumOrder: Our minimum order is $150 for the Greater Philadelphia area.
ai.deliveryInfo: We deliver Monday–Friday throughout the Greater Philadelphia area.
